heading: Mississippi River forecasting improvements
label: 605a Mississippi River forecasting improvements
notes: “Secretary” DefinedSecretary means the Secretary of the Army, see , set out as a note under .section 2 of Pub. L. 113–121section 2201 of this title

children.label: i
children.text: the construction of additional automated river gages;

children.label: ii
children.text: the rehabilitation of existing automated and manual river gages; and

children.label: iii
children.text: the replacement of manual river gages with automated gages, as the Secretary determines to be necessary;

children.label: B
children.text: constructing additional sedimentation ranges on the Mississippi River and its tributaries; and

children.label: C
children.text: deploying additional automatic identification system base stations at river gage sites.

children.heading: Prioritization
children.label: 2 Prioritization
children.text: In carrying out this section, the Secretary shall prioritize the sections of the Mississippi River on which additional and more reliable information would have the greatest impact on maintaining navigation on the Mississippi River.

children.heading: Report
children.label: 3 Report
children.text: Not later than 1 year after , the Secretary shall submit to Congress and make publicly available a report on the activities carried out by the Secretary under this section.June 10, 2014
